_purpose: Verifies the APP keyword reply (added 2026-04-24). Anyone in any thread can text APP / GET APP / DOWNLOAD to receive the install link. Silent fallback if APP_DOWNLOAD_URL secret is unset — these assertions assume the secret IS configured.
assert_outbound_contains: You'll see your trips, polls, and everything we're planning here

messages._note: 1:1 APP keyword from a fresh phone
Mid-conversation APP request from a participant
